productDisplayName: Nike Men's Main Draw White Red Shoe
description: Light on the feet and comfortable the wear, the nike Main Draw makes for a perfect lifetsyle shoe. With a neat design and simple looks, this is a great add to the wardrobe of anyone who likes stylish living.Upper Synthetic upper for durability and comfort Wrap around swoosh for midfoot and heel support, and style Stitch detailing for durability and style Lace-up system with cotton twill laces for snug Fit and comfort Perforated, padded tongue with a cotton fabric inner lining and cotton fabric sockliner for bretahability and dry comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning and impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole for lightweight comfort Alternating and multi-height circular and square lugs for maximum traction and stability Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
